biological_replicate: were only found in the supernatant of tumor cells treated with KRASG12D-specific dIgA in 3 independent experiments
technical_replicate: 20 (daily) doses of intraperitoneal MRTX1133 or 5 injections of KRASG12D-specific dIgA
experimental_design: we first performed intra-tumoral infusions of different treatments
factor_value: the anti-tumor effects of KRASG12D-specific dIgA were greater
number_of_fractions: No mention of fractionation in the text.
number_of_biological_replicates: analyses of 30 human lung cancer tissues
